name: Ebay
notes: eBay Inc. HQ at 2025 Hamilton Ave, San Jose, CA 95125.

name: Atomic
notes: Atomic is a venture studio founded by Jack Abraham. Primary HQ at 215 NW 24th St, Miami FL 33127; also has hubs in San Francisco and New York.

name: Gunder
notes: gunder.com is the website for Gunderson Dettmer Stough Villeneuve Franklin & Hachigian LLP, a top Silicon Valley tech/VC law firm headquartered in Redwood City, CA.

name: Moonlight
notes: All fields already populated; echoed unchanged.

name: Petwell
notes: petwell.com redirects to Petwealth, a Miami-based at-home pet AI diagnostics startup that emerged from stealth in April 2026 with $1.7M raised. Operates as Petwealth but domain is petwell.com.

name: Zigg Capital
notes: PropTech-focused VC firm founded 2018 by Dave Eisenberg and Ryan Orley; city/state already present, added website, domain, and industry.

name: Pre
notes: PRE is an AI-powered e-commerce optimization platform founded by Parham Aarabi (AI professor at University of Toronto). Founder's base is Toronto, Canada. HQ country = Canada; city not confirmed in public sources.

name: Serent
notes: Serent (serent.ai) is a New York-based healthcare AI/RCM company — distinct from Serent Capital (a PE firm in SF/Austin). Confidence med as city sourced from secondary databases, not a direct About page.

name: Usearena
notes: usearena.com is the product/signup URL for Arena (Arena.im), a live audience engagement platform founded 2018 by Brazilian entrepreneurs but headquartered in San Francisco, CA. Products include live chat, live blog, and AI chatbots for media/sports/ecommerce.

name: Entitl
notes: Entitl (entitl.co) describes itself as a 'content broker for hungry AI.' Co-founder Dushyant Khare is based in Singapore. No confirmed city within Singapore found. Foreign company.

name: Topshelf
notes: Top Shelf Ventures is a seed-stage VC fund focused on alcohol brands, founded 2021 by Jason Sherman and Noah Friedman, based in Longwood, Florida.

name: Youdistro
notes: Youdistro (also branded as Distro) is a personal AI podcast host / AI content creation tool found on X (@youdistro). No public HQ location found; appears to be a small/solo operation with no VC funding or registered address in public databases.
